legal_documents.title: MorviqAi Use and Risk Disclosures
legal_documents.content:
Risks of Automated Trading

There are risks unique to automated trading algorithms that you should know about. A system of continuous monitoring or alerting should be set up to let you know if there is a mechanical failure, such as connectivity issues, power loss, a computer crash, or system anomaly. You should also monitor for instances where your automated trading system experiences anomalies that could result in errant, missing, delayed, or duplicated orders.

Mechanical Failures

The theory behind automated trading may seem simple: configure the software, define the rules, and allow it to trade. In reality, automated trading is a sophisticated method of trading and is not infallible.

MorviqAI automation tools may rely on internet connectivity, third-party broker APIs, cloud services, local devices, and other external systems. If an internet connection is lost, a broker API becomes unavailable, power is interrupted, a device crashes, or another system malfunction occurs, orders may fail to send, may be delayed, or may behave unexpectedly.

Monitoring

Although automated systems are designed to reduce manual effort, they still require monitoring or an alerting system. Mechanical failures, connectivity interruptions, API outages, software bugs, and market anomalies may cause unexpected behavior.

It is possible for an automated trading system to experience anomalies that could result in errant orders, missing orders, duplicate orders, delayed execution, or unintended open positions. If the system is monitored and alerts are enabled, these events may be identified and addressed more quickly.

Trading Experience

Your level of trading experience with automated trading systems is important in determining the type of strategies you use.

Highly complex strategies with many variables can be more difficult to understand and manage. Starting with simpler automation strategies may help you gain experience and better understand how different systems behave under real market conditions.

Over-Optimization

Backtesting and simulation tools can be useful, but they have limitations.

Over-optimization refers to excessive curve-fitting of a strategy to historical data, which may create results that appear strong in testing but fail in live markets. It is possible to tune a strategy to past data in a way that does not generalize to future market behavior.

Past simulated or backtested results are not guarantees of future performance.

Programming Discrepancies

There may be discrepancies between:

  • theoretical signals generated by a strategy
  • platform calculations
  • broker order routing systems
  • actual market execution results

Traders should expect a learning curve when using automated systems. It is often prudent to begin with smaller trade sizes or use paper trading while refining strategies.

No High-Frequency Trading

MorviqAI is not a high-frequency trading platform unless explicitly stated otherwise.

Strategies that rely heavily on ultra-low latency execution speed, colocated infrastructure, or microsecond market data advantages may not function as intended through standard retail brokerage connections, residential internet, cloud latency, or consumer devices.

Reliance on Risk-Reducing Orders or Strategies

Risk-reducing tools such as:

  • stop-loss orders
  • stop-limit orders
  • trailing stops
  • exposure caps
  • algorithmic exit rules

may not always be effective.

Market volatility, price gaps, illiquidity, trading halts, broker outages, or rapid price movements may make it impossible to execute orders at expected prices or at all. At times, it may be difficult or impossible to close a position without incurring substantial losses.

Third-Party Dependency Risk

MorviqAI may depend on third-party providers including:

  • brokerage platforms
  • market data providers
  • hosting/cloud infrastructure
  • payment processors
  • authentication services

Failures, outages, delays, or changes by third parties may affect platform functionality and trade execution.

User Responsibility

By enabling automated trading through MorviqAI, you acknowledge:

  • trading involves substantial risk
  • losses may exceed expectations
  • automation may behave unexpectedly
  • monitoring remains your responsibility
  • no profits are guaranteed
  • you remain solely responsible for your account, settings, and decisions

Important Disclaimer

MorviqAI is a technology platform providing software tools and automation features. It does not provide personalized financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. Nothing on the platform should be interpreted as a recommendation to buy or sell any security.

legal_documents.title: MorviqAi Use and Risk Disclosures
legal_documents.content:
MorviqAI Use and Risk Disclosures

IT IS VERY IMPORTANT THAT YOU READ AND FULLY UNDERSTAND THE FOLLOWING RISKS OF TRADING AND INVESTING THROUGH YOUR SELF-DIRECTED MORVIQAI CONNECTED ACCOUNT.

All customer accounts are self-directed. Accordingly, customers are solely responsible for any and all orders placed in their connected brokerage accounts and understand that all orders entered by them, or entered through automation features they authorize, are unsolicited and based on their own investment decisions or the decisions of their duly authorized representative or agent.

Consequently, any customer of MorviqAI agrees that neither MorviqAI nor any of its employees, agents, principals, affiliates, contractors, or representatives:

  • provide personalized investment advice;
  • recommend any specific security, transaction, or order;
  • solicit orders;
  • act as a broker-dealer, market maker, or custodian;
  • make discretionary trades outside of user-authorized settings;
  • guarantee profits or protection from losses;
  • provide legal, tax, or financial planning advice.

To the extent research materials, analytics, signals, watchlists, market commentary, automation tools, educational content, or similar information are made available through MorviqAI, such materials are intended for informational and educational purposes only and do not constitute a recommendation to enter into any securities transaction or engage in any investment strategy.

GENERAL RISKS OF TRADING AND INVESTING

All securities trading, whether in stocks, ETFs, options, cryptocurrencies, futures, forex, or other financial instruments, is speculative in nature and involves substantial risk of loss.

MorviqAI believes it is very important that every user understands all risks of trading or investing prior to using real capital.

Past performance is not necessarily indicative of future results.

By using MorviqAI, users take full responsibility for all trading actions and should make every effort to understand the risks involved.

You May Lose Money

Trading and investing always involve risk.

Users should trade only with funds they can afford to lose. There is no guarantee that any strategy, indicator, algorithm, automation feature, signal, copy-trading feature, or AI-generated output will result in profits or avoid losses.

You may lose some or all invested capital.

Self-Directed Responsibility

MorviqAI is a technology platform.

Users remain solely responsible for:

  • account activity
  • selected risk settings
  • approved assets
  • automation permissions
  • trade size limits
  • profits and losses
  • tax consequences
  • compliance with applicable laws

Automation Risk

Automated trading systems may experience:

  • software bugs
  • outages
  • internet disruption
  • API failures
  • delayed execution
  • duplicate orders
  • missing orders
  • market slippage
  • volatility events
  • broker interruptions

Even with safeguards, automation may not behave as intended.

Users must monitor accounts and understand that emergency intervention may be required.

No Guaranteed Performance

There is no guarantee that:

  • systems will be profitable
  • signals will be accurate
  • AI outputs will be correct
  • strategies will outperform markets
  • losses will be limited

Past performance, hypothetical results, simulations, paper trading, or backtesting do not guarantee future results.

Stop Orders and Risk Controls

Risk-reducing tools such as:

  • stop-loss orders
  • trailing stops
  • max loss limits
  • position caps
  • portfolio controls

may reduce risk but cannot eliminate risk.

During fast markets, gaps, halts, or illiquid conditions, orders may execute at worse prices or fail to execute.

Third-Party Providers

MorviqAI may rely on third-party providers including:

  • brokerages
  • market data vendors
  • cloud hosting providers
  • payment processors
  • authentication systems

Failures or changes by third parties may impact functionality, execution, or access.

No Personalized Advice

Nothing on MorviqAI should be interpreted as:

  • financial advice
  • investment advice
  • tax advice
  • legal advice
  • fiduciary guidance

Users should consult qualified professionals where appropriate.

Copy Trading / Social Trading Risk

Following other traders, strategies, or portfolios involves risk.

Strategies that performed well historically may lose money in future market conditions.

Users remain solely responsible for choosing whether to follow any strategy or trader.

Consent to Use

By using MorviqAI, you acknowledge that:

  • trading involves substantial risk
  • losses may exceed expectations
  • you selected your own settings
  • automation may execute within your authorized limits
  • you remain fully responsible for outcomes
  • no returns are promised or guaranteed

Important Disclaimer

MorviqAI is a software technology platform that provides tools, analytics, automation, and user-directed trading functionality. It is not a bank, broker-dealer, investment adviser, or custodian unless explicitly stated otherwise.

legal_documents.title: Terms and Conditions
legal_documents.content:
MorviqAI – Terms and Conditions of Use

Effective Date: [Insert Date]

Last Updated: [Insert Date]

Welcome to MorviqAI, a Delaware registered business operating the website www.morviqai.com (“MorviqAI,” “Company,” “we,” “us,” or “our”).

These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the MorviqAI website, software platform, AI automation tools, trading dashboards, analytics, alerts, educational content, automated strategy controls, and related services (collectively, the “Platform”).

By accessing or using MorviqAI, creating an account, or connecting a brokerage account, you agree to these Terms.

If you do not agree, do not use the Platform.

1. IMPORTANT DISCLOSURES

1.1 MorviqAI Is a Technology Company

MorviqAI is a software and technology platform.

MorviqAI is not:

  • a broker-dealer
  • an investment adviser
  • a financial planner
  • a bank
  • a custodian
  • a hedge fund
  • a securities exchange
  • a tax advisor
  • a law firm

MorviqAI provides software tools, automation systems, AI analytics, and execution connectivity only.

1.2 Brokerage Services Provided by Third Parties

Trades are executed through third-party brokerage partners, including but not limited to:

Alpaca Securities LLC

Alpaca Crypto LLC

Your brokerage relationship is directly with the applicable broker, not MorviqAI.

All funds, securities, and crypto assets remain held with your broker or custodian.

1.3 No Financial Advice

MorviqAI does not provide:

  • investment advice
  • recommendations to buy or sell securities
  • retirement advice
  • fiduciary advice
  • legal advice
  • tax advice

Any AI-generated outputs, trade scores, probabilities, confidence ratings, alerts, signals, suggested targets, automation rules, or rankings are informational software outputs only.

You alone decide whether to trade.

1.4 Use at Your Own Risk

Trading stocks, ETFs, crypto assets, and other instruments involves substantial risk, including the risk of total loss.

You may lose money rapidly.

Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Use of automation may increase trading frequency and risk.

2. USER ELIGIBILITY

To use MorviqAI you must:

  • be at least 18 years old or legal age in your jurisdiction
  • have authority to use any linked brokerage account
  • provide accurate account information
  • comply with all applicable laws

We may deny service at our discretion.

3. ACCOUNT RESPONSIBILITY

You are solely responsible for:

  • protecting passwords and credentials
  • safeguarding API keys
  • monitoring your account
  • reviewing open trades
  • managing broker permissions
  • enabling or disabling automation
  • ensuring sufficient funds
  • tax reporting obligations

Any activity under your account is deemed authorized by you unless reported otherwise.

4. AUTOMATED TRADING FEATURES

If you enable automation, you authorize MorviqAI to place, modify, or cancel orders through approved broker APIs based on your selected settings.

These settings may include:

  • daily profit targets
  • max daily loss
  • stop losses
  • trailing stops
  • AI confidence thresholds
  • scalping logic
  • re-entry logic
  • compounding logic
  • risk settings
  • scheduled automation windows

Automation may execute without further confirmation once enabled.

You remain fully responsible for all results.

5. NO GUARANTEE OF PROFITS

MorviqAI does not guarantee:

  • profits
  • winning trades
  • reaching income goals
  • consistent returns
  • reduced losses
  • successful execution
  • market outperformance

Any examples of gains, projections, probabilities, or targets are hypothetical estimates only.

6. MARKET AND TECHNOLOGY RISKS

You acknowledge risks including:

  • volatility
  • slippage
  • partial fills
  • rejected orders
  • delayed data
  • exchange outages
  • broker outages
  • API failures
  • software bugs
  • internet interruptions
  • AI model errors
  • cybersecurity incidents
  • unexpected market events

MorviqAI is not liable for resulting losses.

7. CRYPTO ASSET RISKS

Crypto assets are highly volatile and speculative.

Risks may include:

  • extreme price swings
  • illiquidity
  • exchange failures
  • custody issues
  • protocol failures
  • regulatory changes

Crypto trading is not suitable for all users.

8. THIRD-PARTY TERMS APPLY

Your use of connected broker services is also governed by that broker’s own agreements, disclosures, rules, and fee schedules.

This includes margin rules, settlement timing, PDT restrictions, crypto restrictions, and buying power rules.

MorviqAI is not responsible for third-party policy changes or account limitations.

9. FEES

MorviqAI may charge fees for:

  • subscriptions
  • premium AI tools
  • analytics modules
  • automation tiers
  • enterprise access

Broker fees, spreads, exchange fees, financing charges, margin interest, and third-party fees may apply separately.

10. NO FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP

Use of MorviqAI does not create a fiduciary, advisory, agency, employment, or partnership relationship.

11. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All software, branding, source code, UI, AI systems, workflows, text, graphics, and trademarks of MorviqAI remain our exclusive property unless otherwise stated.

You may not:

  • reverse engineer
  • scrape
  • copy
  • resell
  • sublicense
  • misuse the Platform

without written consent.

12. SUSPENSION OR TERMINATION

We may suspend or terminate access at any time for reasons including:

  • fraud suspicion
  • abuse
  • unlawful conduct
  • security concerns
  • nonpayment
  • operational risk
  • regulatory concerns

13. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

To the fullest extent permitted by law, MorviqAI and its affiliates shall not be liable for:

  • trading losses
  • missed gains
  • lost profits
  • tax consequences
  • data loss
  • indirect damages
  • punitive damages
  • consequential damages

Maximum liability, if any, shall not exceed fees paid by you to MorviqAI during the prior three (3) months.

14. INDEMNIFICATION

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless MorviqAI and affiliates from claims arising out of:

  • your trading activity
  • misuse of the Platform
  • violation of law
  • disputes with brokers
  • breach of these Terms

15. PRIVACY

Your use of MorviqAI is also subject to our Privacy Policy.

16. GOVERNING LAW

These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to conflict of law rules.

Any disputes shall be resolved in Delaware unless otherwise required by law.

17. CHANGES TO TERMS

We may update these Terms at any time.

Continued use after updates means acceptance of revised Terms.

18. CONTACT

MorviqAI

Delaware, USA

Website: www.morviqai.com

Email: [Insert Support Email]

19. REQUIRED USER ACKNOWLEDGMENT

By using MorviqAI, you acknowledge:

  • I understand trading involves risk.
  • I may lose all invested capital.
  • MorviqAI is not my financial advisor.
  • AI systems can be wrong.
  • Automation may place trades quickly.
  • I am solely responsible for my account activity.
  • MorviqAI only provides software tools.

20. SPECIAL ALPACA DISCLOSURE

Where execution is provided through Alpaca integrations, custody, execution, clearing, and brokerage services remain with the applicable Alpaca entity or affiliated provider.

MorviqAI does not custody client assets and does not act as a broker.

legal_documents.title: Auto-Trading Authorization
legal_documents.content:
Auto-Trading Authorization

By enabling any automated trading feature on MorviqAI, you (“User”) expressly authorize MorviqAI to communicate with your connected brokerage account through approved API integrations, including but not limited to Alpaca or other supported providers, for the purpose of executing your selected automation settings.

1. Authorization Granted

You authorize MorviqAI to perform actions on your behalf according to the parameters you configure, including:

  • placing buy orders
  • placing sell orders
  • canceling open orders
  • modifying eligible orders
  • monitoring positions
  • reading balances and buying power
  • reading positions and order history
  • applying stop-loss or take-profit logic
  • applying trailing stop logic
  • applying AI-driven probability filters
  • executing scalping logic
  • re-entry logic after completed trades
  • pausing trading after losses
  • stopping trading after reaching your target

This authorization remains active until disabled by you or terminated by MorviqAI.

2. User Control

You understand that all automation settings are selected by you, including but not limited to:

  • daily target profit
  • daily max loss
  • risk per trade
  • maximum number of trades
  • asset types enabled
  • trading schedule
  • aggressive / balanced / conservative mode
  • auto-reinvest / compounding mode
  • stop trading once target is reached

You are solely responsible for reviewing and updating these settings.

3. No Guarantee of Results

You acknowledge that automated trading may result in:

  • profits
  • losses
  • partial fills
  • missed trades
  • rejected orders
  • slippage
  • volatility losses
  • software or API interruptions

MorviqAI makes no guarantee of profits or successful execution.

4. User Responsibility

You remain solely responsible for:

  • all trades executed through your connected account
  • all gains and losses
  • monitoring your account
  • ensuring sufficient buying power
  • understanding broker rules and restrictions
  • disabling automation when desired

Automation is optional and may be turned off by you at any time, subject to open positions or pending orders.

5. AI Decisioning Disclosure

MorviqAI may use AI models, statistical logic, scoring systems, or rules-based engines to identify opportunities and execute trades based on your selected settings.

These outputs are estimates only and may be incorrect.

MorviqAI is not providing financial advice.

6. Brokerage Execution

All executed trades occur through your selected broker.

MorviqAI does not custody funds or securities.

Execution speed, fills, pricing, margin rules, crypto buying power, settlement timing, and broker restrictions are determined by the broker.

7. Revocation of Authorization

You may revoke this authorization at any time by:

  • disabling automation in platform settings
  • disconnecting your brokerage account
  • deleting API credentials
  • closing your MorviqAI account

Revocation does not automatically cancel already submitted orders or close open positions.

8. Assumption of Risk

By enabling auto-trading, you acknowledge:

  • I understand markets are risky.
  • I may lose money quickly.
  • MorviqAI is not my advisor.
  • I am voluntarily enabling automation.
  • I remain fully responsible for all trading activity.
  • I understand AI systems can make incorrect decisions.

9. Acceptance

By clicking Enable Auto-Trading, Connect Broker, or using automation features, you agree to this Auto-Trading Authorization.
